name: taxswitch-calculator
description: Mobile-first tax-aware stock rebalance calculator with Netlify Functions for symbol search and latest prices.

scripts.check: node --check app-core.js && node --check app-ui.js && node --check app.js && node --check sw.js && node --check netlify/functions/search-symbols.js && node --check netlify/functions/get-price.js && node --check netlify/functions/api-status.js && npm run test:math
